name: caveman
description: Skill-based concise-response controls with normal, ultra, and off modes.

interface.shortDescription: Makes replies shorter and easier to scan.
interface.longDescription: Adds the `toggle` skill for switching between ultra, normal, and off concise-response modes.
defaultPrompt: Use caveman:toggle for shorter replies in this chat.
Use caveman:toggle with normal concise mode.
Use caveman:toggle and turn concise mode off.
